ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the code repository */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the package */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer of the package */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the type was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the type */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer of the type */,
  "inheritance" TEXT /* Inheritance hierarchy of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_smells" (
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design smell */,
  "smell_name" TEXT /* Name of the design smell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design smell */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the design smell */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the design smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smell_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smell occurrence */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type where the smell was detected */,
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of smell */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the smell */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the smell was detected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the smell (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the smell was resolved */,
  "resolved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the smell */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the smell */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the smell on the codebase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smell_occurrences_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("smell_id") REFERENCES design_smells ("smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smell_occurrences_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the smell occurrence the task is addressing */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the task is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the task was resolved */,
  "resolved_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_occurrence_id FOREIGN KEY ("occurrence_id") REFERENCES smell_occurrences ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_resolved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is resolved or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module where the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_members" (
  "package_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package member */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the package (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the package */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_members_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_members" (
  "type_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type member */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the type (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the type */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_members_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)
